# Contacts

> A local-first contacts PWA built on @niclaslindstedt/oss-framework. Contacts
> live on-device as JSON, optionally sync to Dropbox or Google Drive (with
> AES-GCM encryption of the cloud copy), and export as vCard 3.0 (.vcf) for
> Outlook / iOS / Android, Outlook-compatible CSV, or a JSON backup.

- App: https://contacts.niclaslindstedt.se/
- About / what it does: https://contacts.niclaslindstedt.se/home/
- Privacy policy: https://contacts.niclaslindstedt.se/privacy/
- Source: https://github.com/niclaslindstedt/contacts
- Framework: https://github.com/niclaslindstedt/oss-framework

## Features

- Contact cards: names, phones, emails, company, address, birthday, notes, photos
- Folders, drag-and-drop, archive, undo/redo, full-text search
- Namespaces: separate address books switched from the side menu
- Themes, achievements, English/Swedish UI, installable offline PWA
